name: doggypile
description: Browser PWA client for a forked alleycat daemon — chat with a codex agent from your phone over iroh.

scripts.stop: cd daemon && cargo run -q -p alleycat --bin alleycat -- stop
scripts.daemon: cd daemon && cargo run -p alleycat --bin alleycat -- serve
scripts.pair: cd daemon && cargo run -q -p alleycat --bin alleycat -- pair --url "${DOGGYPILE_WEB:-https://doggypile.app}" --qr
scripts.build:daemon: cd daemon && cargo build --release -p alleycat --bin alleycat
